title: spiraea mollifolia var. denudata
intro: Spiraea mollifolia var. denudata, also known as naked meadowsweet, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its leafless branches and pink or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spiraea mollifolia var. denudata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
